title: Finally got an estate plan after years of procrastination, mainly from fear…fear of the process. The fear disappeared as we had our initial meeting with Shelly.
quote: Finally got an estate plan after years of procrastination, mainly from fear…fear of the process. The fear disappeared as we had our initial meeting with Shelly. After a few minutes, Shelly had collected the information necessary to begin the estate plan. A few days later, we received the plan to go over and make any changes. We met (via) video call to have any questions answered, and they were answered in a very understandable way leave no doubt about the meaning of the verbiage in the plan. We mad an appointment for the following week to sign. The signing was actually kinda fun…Shelly is really funny!
name: — Brad Lemon

title: You (Shelly) and the staff at Crain & Wooley were so very easy to work with.
quote: (Shelly) I want to thank you for working with me to prepare my Living Trust documents and portfolio. I’ve meant to do this for a long time. I even ordered a do-it-yourself kit online; however, I realized this was too important to attempt it myself. I’m very thankful a friend invited me to attend a Crain & Wooley seminar to hear the presentation on the many benefits of developing a Living Trust portfolio in lieu of probating my will upon my death. I wanted to lessen the burden on my children when my time comes to go home to my Lord. The Living Trust method will be much easier and considerably cheaper in the long run when considering the extra expense of hiring an attorney to probate my will, not to mention the months it would take to even get on a probate court docket.You (Shelly) and the staff at Crain & Wooley were so very easy to work with. I truly appreciate you taking the time to explain each step of the process to me and my children in a manner we could understand. I know I made the right decision, and I can truly say I can sleep better knowing everything is taken care of.
name: — Dave K.

title: You made everything so convenient for me.
quote: Thank you so much for doing all of the hard work for me. You made everything so convenient for me. It’s so nice to have everything organized in a nice binder.
name: — Carol E.

quote: When me and my wife were invited to attend a Crain & Wooley estate planning presentation, we had no knowledge of the process. Since we had discussed the need to plan for eventual demise, we decided to work with the firm to establish a Revocable Living Trust. title: We were entirely pleased with the whole process of getting our trust prepared.
quote: Justin, we are very pleased with the service we received from your law firm. We did not feel pressured or rushed during our initial consultation. We had requested that our POA and MPOA documents be signed and notarized earlier than the remainder of our documents due to a business trip that we were taking and that was done. We were entirely pleased with the whole process of getting our trust prepared.

title: I recommend her and the firm with confidence.
quote: Ms. Joyner was professional, thoughtful and efficient. Our family found ourselves in need of legal representation after the passing of our mother because she had not fully updated her account to place them in her trust. Her knowledge of probate, the procedures, and the local court was evident. I felt prepared, and we were able to achieve our goal in a timely manner. Because Ms. Joyner handled the probate case well, we will continue to use her services as we work to settle the estate. I recommend her and the firm with confidence.

I highly recommend and will work with Shelly Joyner and Crain & Wiiley again in the future.

title: I had a fantastic experience with your law firm and now I can relax!
quote: I had a fantastic experience with your law firm and now I can relax because I have my affairs in order! It was a very easy process, very informative, easy to gather their information and get the awesome result of having all my documents into my trust. Very impressed with the professionalism of Shelly Joiner, Jessica and Steve. I highly recommend this law firm Crain & Wooley for all the estate planning needs. Thank you!
name: — Wanda Echevarria

title: Very Professional, Thorough and Good Communicators
quote: Justin and his staff were very professional, thorough and good communicators. They prepared every doc they committed to, and in a timely manner. I like the lump sum fee arrangement. I would definitely recommend them.
name: — Bart Hubbard

title: Provides Us Peace of Mind
quote: The staff is friendly and knowledgeable. Stephen answered questions even before we asked them. Shelley responded quickly to inquiries work was done promptly. We feel like we received good guidance on how to proceed and a good value. The trust seems to address our concerns and wishes and provides us peace of mind that our survivors will inherit our assets without too much hassle.Our survivors will be the ultimate judges of if this was worth it!
name: — Tom Bauer

title: A Great Initial Experience
quote: I had a great initial experience with attorney Justin Crain. We enjoyed working with the front desk. She is always friendly and accommodating. Last, Steve Crosby is a very pleasant person that is detail-oriented and answers questions kindl
name: — Lula Thomas

title: Strong Sense of Peace & That Every Thing Had Been Addressed
quote: I am pleased to recommend Crain & Wooley for trust work. As with any new endeavor there were many unknowns and uncertainties. Justin patiently took Nancy and me through the process, addressing them all, including the repeats, We had some exceptional issues we may face several years along, and Justin laid out a plan how they might be addressed at the right time. We were able to conclude the trust-creation process with strong sense of peace & that everything had been addressed and that there were multiple paths forward for the future. C&W's costs were reasonable for the work they did. Whatever was needed they made it happen.
name: — Thomas & Nancy Visel

title: We Felt Valued, Cared for and Appreciated
quote: It was a pleasure working with Justin Crain, Shelly Joyner, Steve Crosby, and the entire staff at Crain and Wooley. From the moment we walked into their office, we felt valued, cared for and appreciated. Justin took the time to explain to us the benefits of creating a trust and patiently answered all of our questions. My wife and I particularly appreciated their educational emphasis. They provided us with videos and literature that deepened our understanding of the process and purpose of creating a trust. We never felt any pressure during our meetings with them to purchase any legal products or services. They educated us, encouraged us to ask questions, and let us make our own decision. We did decide to create a living trust, and we are very pleased with the results.
name: — William Benninghoff

title: We are so grateful we did this.
quote: We had been wanting to do and understand a trust for a long time. Once we received the meeting invite, the rest was easy. We learned about wills and trusts in an understandable way. Justin and his team are organized, thorough, friendly and helpful. They coordinated and explained each step of the process. We are so grateful we did this. The cost was invaluable. Thank you for everything.
name: — Shelly Torti

title: Would Definitely Recommend Crain & Wooley
quote: We attended a lunch seminar hosted by Shelly Joyner and her team to listen and learn more about our options with Trusts. Based on Shelly's presentation, examples, and knowledge of Trusts, we were sold on Crain & Wooley as the firm to prepare and manage our Trust.The Crain & Wooley process from start to finish was fast, efficient and very professional. Throughout the progression, both Shelly and Steve Crosby communicated, answered all our questions, and provided various trust documents through the portal for our review /comments.Would highly recommend the services of Crain & Wooley!!
name: — Paul & Helen Cherry

title: Courtesy, Professionalism, and Friendliness
quote: I attended a seminar led by Justin Crain, and knew I could work with him. I set up an appointment with him before leaving that day.Justin is intelligent, approachable, and speaks common, everyday English frequently, only switching to legal terminology when necessary! My questions were answered in terms I understood.I feel confident that my family will receive the same courtesy, professionalism, and friendliness when the time comes for them to work with Justin.
name: — Susan Kay Davis

title: Exceptionally Helpful
quote: We were very pleased with the services of Crain & Wooley in setting up our Living Trust. Shelly Joyner was exceptionally helpful and explained all aspects in easily understood language. She expedited our trust as we requested due to an international trip we had planned. Her professionalism and pleasant demeanor made the whole experience very easy and smooth. I highly recommend that anyone considering establishing estate planning to call them.
name: — Dennis Fisher

title: A Great Experience for Me
quote: I asked my friend Karen if she had an attorney that did wills. She became excited and told me about a group of fantastic attorneys who took care of me. I called Crain and Wooley, spoke to a lovely sweet welcoming young lady, Jessica, who gave me an appointment the following Monday. I was helped by Thomas Hendrix, a known attorney, with a delightful personality.My final meeting was with a notary and two witnesses. This has been a great experience for me. I definitely recommend them.
name: — Laura D

title: Thank you and God Bless you
quote: Thank you for being my Living Trust and other Estate documents attorney. Due to our move and storage of business and personal documents, we had trouble locating & we took a lot longer to respond to your drafts, etc. You were very patient with me and my needing lots of explaining of legal terms and meanings. At my age, I was concerned about getting things done but wanting it all done right. You were very prompt in responding to my questions and I think by time of signing I felt confident we had things just the way we wanted to protect my heirs. Thank you and God Bless you.
name: — Donna V.

title: Very much appreciated
quote: I am very much appreciated your service If anyone like me needed your service I will introduce about you. Everything you did with in a week. Very much satisfied all your service.
name: — Sarah P.

title: Smooth and easy
quote: Learning about trusts at the meal was easy and educational. The set down at the office was where the finer points of trusts was explained. That is where and when we decided to make it safe and easy for our heirs. Our final meeting where we signed everything and an explanation of each item was given went smooth and easy. All in all I would say the investment in the trust was worth it.Thank you to Crain & Wooley office and staff
name: — Anonymous

title: Professional and knowledgeable
quote: My husband and I recently had our living trust completed through the help of Crain and Wooley. Justin and his staffs are professional and knowledgeable. A special thanks to client education specialist Stephen. He is such a nice gentleman and always answers our questions clearly and right to the point, and always ready to help by answering your concerns promptly. We will certainly refer the law firm to our families and friends!
name: — Susan X.

title: Excellent, Highly recommend
quote: We went to seminar to just find out what we needed to do for a will, They gave us all the info we needed right then there. Offered a really good price if we signed up to get one that day. A few weeks later after our appointment we have a Living trust. They were helpful with all our questions and were very thorough with these explaining the whole process. They stuck with the price that we paid + let us call anytime if we had any questions. Excellent, Highly recommend this company.
name: — Linda B.

title: So good to finally have a plan
quote: After worrying about our lack of estate planning for years, it feels so good to finally have a plan in place. Thank you for making the process relativity painless and offering the educational support we needed.
name: — Leslie W.

title: 5 Stars
quote: Me and my appreciate Mr. Crosby we think that he was very professional in doing his job and we give him 5 stars when it come to him doing his Job.
name: — James A.

title: Overall experience was seamless
quote: We recently had the opportunity to attend a workshop hosted by Crain & Wooley regarding wills and estate planning. Based on the information provided we decided to proceed with our estate planning with Justin and his team. The overall experience was seamless and the process was clearly communicated. We had our homework and once that was completed, several iterations later we had our final walk-through and signed estate plan. We would recommend Justin to our family and friends.
name: — Earl B.

title: Process went smoothly
quote: The estate planning process went smoothly with the Crain / Wooley team. The staff was informative and followed up promptly with us during the drafting of our plan.
name: — Doug L.

title: Greatly appreciated
quote: Mr. Crain, thank you for providing us with the opportunity to comment on the services provided to us by your firm and staff. I am writing on behalf of my sister. My sister has been incapacitated for over two months now and has faced life threatening medical issues, which prompted her to revisit her last will and testament, and make the decision to revise her benefactors. While she is still hospitalized, I am glad to say that she is making slow progress and we hope to reach the recovery process soon. On behalf of my sister and my family, I am so thankful to your firm, and specifically for Thomas Hendrix, who acted quickly on my sister's request and provided us with her new documents for review and finalization in the hospital. I cannot begin to express how much his immediate attention and services were greatly appreciated and put my sister's mind at ease. In addition, your office staff is great too, each phone call and email communication were promptly addressed. It was our pleasure in meeting Mr. Hendrix and I will certainly refer him and your firm to friends and family.Thank you kindly,
name: — Petra P.

title: Definitely a 5 Star firm!
quote: Our experience with Crain + Wooley was top notch. We initially attended a complimentary dinner and were so impressed with Justin and his staffthat we hired them on the spot. Our trust is complete and we understand the entire document. Thanks to Morgan who did an excellent job walking us through it and remained patient as we continued to make changes. Definitely a 5 Star firm!
name: — Michele M.

title: Very professional and efficient
quote: It was great working with Justin and Team at Crain & Wooley. Extremely pleased with their service. Very professional and efficient. Justin has given us peace of mind in setting up of our Living Trust. Would highly recommend Crain & Wooley.
name: — Aubrey P.
